sectionHeader.title: Careers
description: Join our dynamic team of innovators and creators who are passionate about building the future of mobile applications. At MasterFabric, we believe in fostering talent, embracing challenges, and creating solutions that matter.

hero.title: Build Your Career With Us
hero.subtitle: Join the MasterFabric Family
hero.description: We are a growing team of passionate developers, designers, and strategists who love creating mobile applications. Our company culture is built on continuous learning, innovation, and collaboration. We don't just hire employees – we welcome new family members who share our vision of transforming ideas into impactful digital solutions.

companyStructure.title: How We Work
companyStructure.description: We build exceptional mobile applications through collaborative teams, modern workflows, and cutting-edge technology.

departments.name: Engineering
departments.description: Our development team creates robust, scalable mobile applications using modern frameworks and best practices.

departments.name: Design
departments.description: Our design team crafts intuitive user experiences and beautiful interfaces that users love.

departments.name: Product
departments.description: Our product team ensures every feature delivers value and aligns with business objectives.

departments.name: DevOps
departments.description: Our DevOps team maintains reliable infrastructure and streamlined deployment processes.

employeeCare.title: How We Care for Our Team
employeeCare.description: We believe that happy employees create amazing products. Our comprehensive benefits and supportive work environment reflect our commitment to your well-being and professional growth.

benefits.title: Flexible Work Environment
benefits.description: Hybrid work model with comfortable office space and remote work options

benefits.title: Learning & Development
benefits.description: Annual learning budget, conference attendance, and skill development programs

benefits.title: Health & Wellness
benefits.description: Comprehensive health insurance, mental health support, and wellness programs

benefits.title: Competitive Compensation
benefits.description: Market-competitive salaries, performance bonuses, and equity participation

benefits.title: Work-Life Balance
benefits.description: Generous vacation policy, flexible hours, and sabbatical opportunities

benefits.title: Career Growth
benefits.description: Clear career progression paths, mentorship programs, and leadership opportunities

hiringProcess.title: Our 4-Step Hiring Process
hiringProcess.description: We've designed our hiring process to be transparent, efficient, and meaningful for both candidates and our team.

steps.title: Application Review
steps.description: Our hiring team carefully reviews your application, portfolio, and experience to ensure alignment with our values and requirements.

steps.title: Initial Interview
steps.description: A conversational interview with our HR team and hiring manager to get to know you better and discuss your background, motivations, and career goals.

steps.title: Technical Assessment
steps.description: Depending on the role, this may include coding challenges, design tasks, or strategic case studies that reflect real work scenarios.

steps.title: Final Interview
steps.description: Meet with team leads and potential colleagues to discuss collaboration, answer questions, and finalize the mutual fit assessment.

applicationForm.title: Interested in Working With Us?
applicationForm.subtitle: Don't see the perfect role? We're always looking for talented individuals to join our team.
applicationForm.description: Even if there isn't a current opening that matches your skills, we'd love to hear from you. Send us your information and we'll reach out when opportunities arise that align with your expertise.

position.label: Position of Interest
position.placeholder: What role are you interested in?

experience.label: Years of Experience
experience.placeholder: How many years of experience do you have?

portfolio.label: Portfolio/LinkedIn URL
portfolio.placeholder: Share your portfolio or LinkedIn profile

message.label: Why MasterFabric?
message.placeholder: Tell us why you want to work with MasterFabric and what makes you a great fit for our team...

quote.text: At MasterFabric, we don't just build applications – we build careers, relationships, and the future of mobile technology. Every team member contributes to our mission of transforming innovative ideas into impactful digital solutions.
quote.author: MasterFabric Team
